About

Finance and accounting work with a calm, analytical edge.

I am a finance and accounting student preparing for the CPA and CFA exams. This portfolio collects practical projects, technical notes, and study work that show how I think through financial information.

Current Path

Building fluency in reporting, valuation, audit, tax, economics, and portfolio analysis.

What I Value

Clear assumptions, clean schedules, evidence-backed conclusions, and communication that respects the reader.
